Slide_Subtitle: Comprehensive Process Optimization Study (from 500 to 1500 kg/h)
Visual_Concept: Title Slide: Dark navy background with geometric chemical plant patterns. Large bold white typography.

Main_Content:
OBJECTIVE: Minimize power consumption while maintaining process safety.
SCOPE: 500-1500 kg/h (Mass) | 3500-3800 m3/h (Volume)
CONSTRAINTS: Min Approach > 0.5 C | Discharge P < 37 bar
DELIVERABLES: 11 Optimal Points | Extended Dataset | Optimization Engine

1. HYSYS Solver Instability: Frequent failures at extreme conditions (30-40% fail rate)
2. Process Hysteresis: Reverse scans fail at 900 kg/h (deltaT = 4C)
3. COM Interface Limits: Background automation failed (Solver.CanSolve lock)
4. Constraint Violations: Sensitive Min Approach near critical points
5. Multi-dimensional Search: Complex trade-offs between P / T / Flow
Visual_Concept: List with Icons: Vertical stack of 5 red warning boxes.

Main_Content:
v1 Comprehensive: Strict constraints & Hard Reset (Baseline)
v2 Unified: Data-driven strategy & Surrogate models (85% success)
v3 Hybrid: Smart Algorithm Dispatch (Secant + Grid) -> 3x Speedup & 100% Reliability
v4 Multidimensional: Mass x Volume optimization & Extended Data

Slide_Subtitle: Benchmarking Anchor vs. Secant vs. Grid
Main_Content:
ANCHOR: Use for Endpoints -> Very Fast -> 100% Reliable
SECANT: Use for Mid-flows -> Moderate Speed -> 85% Reliable
GRID SCAN: Use for Difficult regions -> Slow -> 100% Reliable

HYBRID RESULT: 3x Speedup + 100% Reliability

RELATIONSHIP: P_optimal = 3.0 + 0.004 * (MassFlow - 500)
